prompt_inputs.goal: 1-day meal plan for a cyclist with a high-intensity 2-hour training session in the afternoon

solution_criteria: Meal plan includes 4-5 meals/snacks distributed throughout the day
Caloric and carbohydrate intake is elevated to support the 2-hour high-intensity cycling session
All meals and snacks comply with vegetarian and no-nuts restrictions
Meals are concise and practical for a single day
task_description: Write a compact, concise 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Testing with an endurance sport athlete (e.g., cyclist) with varying intensity training days to confirm the meal plan adapts caloric and nutrient needs based on activity levels

prompt_inputs.goal: Marathon training - maximize carbohydrate intake and sustained energy for high-intensity endurance performance

solution_criteria: Meal plan contains exactly 4-5 meals distributed throughout the day
Carbohydrates comprise 55-65% of total daily calories with emphasis on complex carbs
Protein intake is 1.2-1.6g per pound of body weight to support muscle recovery
Each meal includes specific food examples and approximate portion sizes
task_description: Write a compact, concise 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Testing with a high-intensity sport athlete (e.g., marathon runner) requiring elevated calorie and carbohydrate intake to assess proper macro-nutrient distribution across meals

prompt_inputs.goal: Build muscle and strength through weightlifting with optimal protein timing around training sessions

solution_criteria: Meal plan includes 4-5 meals distributed throughout the day with pre- and post-workout nutrition timing
Total daily protein meets or exceeds 160g (0.8g per pound of body weight) with protein distributed across meals
Includes specific meal recommendations with approximate macronutrient content for each meal
Plan is compact and presented in a clear, easy-to-follow format suitable for one day
task_description: Write a compact, concise 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Testing with a strength-based sport athlete (e.g., weightlifter) with specific protein requirements and meal timing around training sessions to verify workout nutrition strategies
